title: EST Prep: Decode, Recall, Respond
theme: Assessment literacy, content revision, command verbs, and structured response building

overview.tagline: Train for the EST by decoding the question, recalling the right content, and building mark-worthy answers under pressure.
overview.playerFantasy: Enter an exam-prep simulator where smart decoding, strong recall, and well-structured answers increase readiness, confidence, and rewards.
overview.teacherValue: Turns revision and exam technique into visible, evidence-rich gameplay aligned to EST question patterns and marking expectations.

gameplayIdentity.whyItDiffersFromMegatrends: Megatrends focuses on future-of-work scenarios. EST Prep focuses on decoding assessment questions, structuring responses, and applying syllabus knowledge for marks.

learningObjectives: Identify command verbs and choose an appropriate answer structure.
Decode EST questions using verb, topic, context, and structure.
Recall the assessed content from the current EST revision topics.
Apply glossary terms accurately within responses.
Construct concise, mark-worthy answers for different EST question types.

sharedStatEffects.description: Strong assessment literacy improves confidence and strategic decision-making.
High performance rewards the player financially within the wider game ecosystem.
Efficient answering and planning protect time and reduce stress.
Students who communicate clearly and think strategically strengthen employability.

gameplayLoop.label: Decode the question
gameplayLoop.description: Identify the command verb, topic, context term, and required structure.

gameplayLoop.label: Recall content
gameplayLoop.description: Pull the right curriculum knowledge from the current EST revision topics.

gameplayLoop.label: Build the structure
gameplayLoop.description: Choose or assemble the answer structure that matches the command verb and marks.

gameplayLoop.label: Write the answer
gameplayLoop.description: Produce a short response under light pressure.

gameplayLoop.label: Check against marking logic
gameplayLoop.description: Review what would earn marks and improve the answer if needed.

gameplayLoop.label: Bank rewards
gameplayLoop.description: Gain readiness, confidence, salary, and class contribution.

parts.label: Verb
parts.description: What does the question want you to do?

parts.label: Topic
parts.description: What concept are you writing about?

parts.label: Context
parts.description: What situation or glossary term narrows the response?

parts.label: Structure
parts.description: What answer pattern should you use to earn marks?

commandVerbFocus.structure: what it is plus one key feature
point plus explanation plus example plus result

currentRevisionTopics: unexpected life events and career planning
megatrends and the future of work

activities.title: EST Content Check
activities.purpose: Rehearse the assessed content from the current revision sheet using rapid topic-based checks.

activities.title: VTCS Decoder
activities.purpose: Train students to isolate the verb, topic, context, and structure in EST-style questions.

activities.title: Glossary Check
activities.purpose: Strengthen understanding of glossary terms used as the context of EST questions.

activities.title: EST Boss Round
activities.purpose: Combine content knowledge, glossary precision, VTCS decoding, and short-answer structure in one exam-style response.

employabilityFocus.whyItFits: Students need concise, accurate written responses using correct terms and structures.
Students interpret question wording, marks, and evidence before answering.
Students must allocate effort efficiently under assessment pressure.

chapters.title: Decode the Question
chapters.hook: Find the verb, topic, context, and answer structure before time runs out.

chapters.title: Lock In the Glossary
chapters.hook: Match the right glossary concept to the right assessment context.

chapters.title: Revision Arena
chapters.hook: Survive quick-fire questions on the actual assessed content for this EST.

chapters.title: Build the Answer
chapters.hook: Turn decoded questions into concise mark-worthy responses.

chapters.title: Beat the Marking Key
chapters.hook: Improve weak responses and learn what earns marks.

teacherSignals: students who decode correctly but lack content recall
students who know content but misuse the command verb
